title: Office of the Fair Work Ombudsman
description: The Office of the Fair Work Ombudsman assists the Fair Work Ombudsman to provide education, assistance, advice and guidance to employers, employees, outworkers, outworker entities and organisations; to promote and monitor compliance with workplace laws; to inquire into and investigate breaches of the Fair Work Act; and to take appropriate enforcement action.
dashboard_name: Office of the Fair Work Ombudsman (FWO)

tree.title: Office of the Fair Work Ombudsman
